name: Celularity Inc
summary: Celularity Inc. is a regenerative and cellular medicines company focused on aging-related and degenerative diseases, leveraging placental biology. Its commercial biomaterials business includes Biovance 3L (tri-layer decellularized dehydrated amniotic membrane) and Rebound product lines sold directly and through distributors. The company also develops placental-derived cellular therapy candidates for cancer, infectious, and degenerative diseases, and operates its own manufacturing and storage facility.

products.name: Biovance 3L
products.description: Tri-layer decellularized, dehydrated human amniotic membrane biomaterial product.

products.name: Rebound
products.description: Biomaterial product sold directly and through distribution network.

products.name: Celularity IMPACT
products.description: Celularity platform referenced as a trademark in the filing.

partnerships.description: Third-party distributors used for sale of biomaterials products including Biovance 3L and Rebound.
